name: Auto-Update via GitHub Releases
objective: Add one-click 'update to latest release' button in Configuracion with state-driven UX, wired to electron-updater + GitHub provider; CI must publish latest.yml.
exit_criteria: Configuracion shows 'Versión actual: X.Y.Z' + 'Buscar actualizaciones' button
'Reiniciar e instalar ahora' closes app, runs installer silently, relaunches
Silent startup check after 30s; Snackbar appears in Layout if update available
Dev mode shows friendly 'Modo desarrollo' message, never crashes
CI publishes latest.yml + .exe + .blockmap to GitHub Releases
npm run dist:linux produces working AppImage
No hardcoded version strings in renderer; no electron-updater calls in renderer (IPC only)
